instruction: I need to "turn off" notifications for my system in the settings.
answer_text: Notifications have been successfully turned off. The main Notifications toggle at the top of the Settings > System > Notifications page is now in the "Off" position, which disables all notifications from apps and system senders.

instruction: Enable the "Night light" feature and set it to turn on at 7:00 PM and off at 7:00 AM.
answer_text: Night light feature has been successfully enabled and configured. The schedule is set to turn on at 7:00 PM and turn off at 7:00 AM as requested. The "Set hours" option is selected with the correct times displayed in the Turn on and Turn off rows.

instruction: I need to change my system time zone to 'Pacific (US & Canada)'. Can you help me do that?
Change my desktop background to a solid color.
answer_text: Desktop background successfully changed to solid blue color.

instruction: Enable the "Storage Sense" feature and configure it to run every week.
answer_text: Storage Sense has been successfully enabled and configured to run every week. The toggle is switched "On" and the frequency dropdown shows "Every week" as selected.
